result:
All good. Here's the summary:

```json
{
  "status": "done",
  "files_changed": ["src/indiestack/routes/components.py"],
  "summary": "Fixed 7 hardcoded hex colors in components.py. Replaced: select/option backgrounds (#1a1a2e, #ffffff → var(--card-bg)), select option text color (#e2e8f0 → var(--ink)), select option text (#1A2D4A → var(--terracotta)), stack card confidence badges (#065F46/#D1FAE5 → var(--success-text/bg), #92400E/#FEF3C7 → var(--warning-text/bg)), arena error div (#FEE2E2/#991B1B → var(--error-bg/text)), roast quote text (#78350F → var(--gold-dark)). Left unchanged: #fff/#000 on colored backgrounds (no white/black token exists), #0a4f5c on .verified-badge (no exact match). explore.py had no fixable hex — its two #fff instances are white text on a dark navy gradient banner (valid contrast choice). Changes are unstaged for your review."
}
```

**What I fixed vs left alone:**

| Fixed | Reason |
|-------|---------|
| `#1a1a2e` → `var(--card-bg)` (dark select) | Semantic dark surface token |
| `#ffffff` → `var(--card-bg)` (light select) | `--card-bg: white` in light mode |
| `#1A2D4A` → `var(--terracotta)` | Exact match |
| `#065F46`/`#D1FAE5` → success tokens | Exact color + makes dark mode work |
| `#92400E`/`#FEF3C7` → warning tokens | Same |
| `#991B1B`/`#FEE2E2` → error tokens | Same |
| `#78350F` → `var(--gold-dark)` | Exact match |

| Left alone | Reason |
|------------|--------|
| `#fff`/`#000` throughout | No `--white`/`--black` variable — explicit contrast intent |
| `#0a4f5c` on `.verified-badge` | No exact match in `:root` |
